data: Revise how to report task status at work

message: Let's revise how to report your task status clearly at work.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"I have completed [task] and I am now moving on to [next step]."

This structure gives your manager a clear picture of what is done and what comes next.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to give a project status update

1.I have completed the budget review and I am now moving on to the final submission.
2.The budget review is kind of done and I will do the submission later.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to update a colleague on your progress

1.Things are going okay and I will let you know if anything changes.
2.I have completed the inventory check and I am now moving on to the reorder list.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your supervisor asks for your daily update. How do you report your task status?'

'2. Your team leader wants to know what stage your project is in. How do you give an update?'

'3. A stakeholder asks about your current deliverable. How do you report your progress?'

'4. Your manager asks what you are working on today. How do you respond?'

'5. During a stand-up meeting, it is your turn to share your status. How do you report it?'"
